seo.title: The House | ArdenNest - Quiet luxury holiday home
seo.description: Discover our holiday home with 9 bedrooms and ensuite bathrooms, professional kitchen with Lacanche stove and 2 hectares of garden.

title: The House
h1: Where the whole group comes together — and nobody goes without.
subtitle: A place where families come together

kitchen.title: Commercial-Grade Kitchen
kitchen.description: Cooking for 26 is not a chore here — it's the highlight of the day. Two professional dishwashers clean everything in one go after dinner. A Lacanche stove where four cooks can work side by side. And enough cold storage for the entire weekend shop. No washing-up arguments, no shortage of pans, no stress.
features_list: 2 Miele Professional dishwashers: 26 plates, 26 glasses, 26 sets of cutlery — all clean in 30 minutes. No chore, no discussion about who does the dishes.
Lacanche Cluny stove: Restaurant-grade stove with gastronorm oven and warming cabinet. Room for multiple cooks to work at the same time.
Full commercial equipment: Professional pots, pans and utensils for 26 guests. Everything you need to cook ambitiously — or simply easily for a large group.
Custom cold storage: Professional fridge and cool pantry with room for the entire group's groceries. No Tetris with packed fridges.

bathrooms.title: 9 Ensuite Bathrooms
bathrooms.description: The biggest stress with a large group? The morning rush in the bathroom. At ArdenNest, that doesn't exist. Every bedroom has its own bathroom — fully enclosed, with shower or bath, toilet and washbasin. No queue, no schedule, no fuss. 9 rooms, 9 bathrooms.
features_list: No morning arguments: Everyone showers whenever it suits them. No schedule, no queue, no 'who used all the hot water.' That's the comfort that makes the difference.
Completely private: Every bathroom is fully enclosed with its own toilet, washbasin and shower or bath. No shared spaces, even with 26 guests.
Silent ventilation: All bathrooms are equipped with silent central ventilation. Optimal air quality without waking anyone up.
Towel service: Quality towels available as an optional extra. One less thing to pack, one less thing to organise.

bedrooms.title: 9 Bedrooms — Honest Comfort
bedrooms.description: No fuss about who gets the biggest room. Our nine bedrooms are spread across two floors and all offer the same high comfort: boxspring beds with 25 cm thick mattresses and De Witte Lietaer bed linen. Choose the room that suits your family — everything else takes care of itself.
features_list: 3 rooms for 2 people: Ideal for couples or grandparents seeking peace and quiet. Each with its own ensuite bathroom and the same quality finish as every other room.
4 rooms for 3 people: Flexible for families with a child. Enough space without feeling like a hall — just right for togetherness and privacy.
2 rooms for 4 people: With mezzanine — the favourite with children. Sleeping 'in the attic' feels like an adventure, while parents read their book downstairs.

De Witte Lietaer bed linen: Pure cotton sateen from a Belgian family business setting the standard since 1898. Blissfully soft with a subtle sheen — waking up well-rested is the foundation of a great stay.

oakTable.title: The Oak Table
oakTable.description: This is the moment you book for: 26 people at one table. No separate kids' corner, no two tables in two rooms. Three solid oak tables form one long surface of 7.2 metres — with a view of the garden through the large gate. This is where your stories, dishes and glasses come together.
features_list: 7.2 metres long, 26 seats: The whole group sits together. No separate kids' table, no rotation, no "we don't fit." One table, everyone included.
Extra wide: Wide enough so everyone can see and hear each other. Dishes go round, conversations cross — the way a family dinner should be.
Comfortable chairs: Belgian-crafted chairs you'll happily stay in long after dessert. No folding chairs, no benches.
Custom mood lighting: Lighting mounted on an original farmhouse beam — our own design that suits the atmosphere of an authentic 1849 farmstead.

garden.title: Play & Enjoy
garden.description: Endless space for all ages — outside, inside and covered

livingSpace.title: Cosy Living Space
livingSpace.description: A house for 26 that feels like a home — not a hall. Different seating areas mean you naturally split into smaller groups after dinner: a chat by the fireplace, a board game at the table, a glass of wine overlooking the garden. Being together without being on top of each other.
features_list: Fireplace: The centrepiece of the evening. Gather by the fire while the children are already in bed.
Multiple seating areas: Not one big hall, but several spots to settle into. Everyone finds their own corner — or joins in.
Intimate atmosphere: Authentic materials, warm lighting and thoughtful furnishing. It feels like home, even with a large group.
Garden views: The large windows overlook the rolling landscape. Keeping an eye on the children while sitting on the sofa — that's possible here.

cta.title: Ready to book?
cta.description: Check availability and book directly with us for the best price.
